items.title: Saudis must recognise Israel for nuclear deal, says Trump
items.summary: The US president says the landmark agreement to help Saudis develop nuclear energy is dependent on it joining the Abraham Accords.

items.title: Discovery of New Avocado Types Could Lead to More Superfood Choices and Resilience
items.summary: Scientists trudging through Nicaragua’s rainforest have identified a “hotbed” of avocado species diversity. The fruit was first transported hundreds of miles to Central America from South America arou…
